chunks.title: Prayer for Guarded Speech
chunks.reason: David petitions Yahweh to guard his mouth and heart from wickedness.

chunks.title: Reproof and the Fate of Enemies
chunks.reason: The psalmist accepts correction from the righteous and describes the destruction of his enemies.

chunks.title: Refuge and Final Vindication
chunks.reason: David expresses trust in Yahweh as refuge and asks for the wicked to fall into their own traps.
